hook_en: Pick one marketing action per day — devlog, trailer, festival, meme — and steer your indie game from 0 to 20k wishlists before your runway burns out.
hook_ru: Жми одну из 6 карточек маркетинга в день — девлог, трейлер, фестиваль, мем — и доведи инди-игру от 0 до 20 000 вишлистов раньше, чем кончится ранвей.
mechanic: Turn-based dashboard sim. Six action cards (Devlog/Trailer/Festival/Meme/Press/Rest); one click = one day; daily seed shuffles payoffs ±40%. Reach 20k wishlists in 180 days. Morale gates output (burnout halves payouts).

design.non_timer_pressure: 180-day turn budget + morale resource (NOT a real-time clock)
